primary_function: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify output emphasizes visual expression over textual explanation
Confirm design philosophy is 4-6 substantial paragraphs as specified
Ensure craftsmanship language appears multiple times with phrases like 'meticulously crafted' and 'master-level execution'
Validate that text usage is described as minimal, essential-only, and integrated as visual elements
Confirm output focuses on spatial communication and artistic interpretation
Verify aesthetic movement has a concise 1-2 word name
Ensure philosophy addresses space, form, color, composition, and visual hierarchy
Confirm final work is described as appearing sophisticated and museum-quality
Validate that conceptual references are described as subtle and refined
Verify output avoids redundancy in design principles
trigger_text: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
